facebook-scrape.summary: Scraped Facebook (12:16 AM ET Mar 31). Totals: 113 comments, 38 positive, 1 DM, 11 interest signals, 16 groups, 18 posts live. New since last run: 4 confirmed new posts (Window Cleaning Newbies, Pro Window Cleaning, Pressure Washing Business Owners, USA Car Detailing) posted ~11 PM ET Mar 30. 1 Junk Removal Winners post possibly pending moderation. 2 new comment engagements: Paul Smith in PLUMBERS TALK, Curt's carpet cleaning in Commercial Cleaning Support Group. Multiple group welcome tags (not Novaro AI engagement). 0 new DMs.

linkedin-scrape.summary: Scraped LinkedIn (12:37 AM ET Mar 31): 1,039 total connections (unchanged), 153 pending sent requests (28 sent today targeting landscaping/electrical business owners), 0 new acceptances, 8 outreach messages sent (to landscapers/contractors — Colin Crump, Tyler Grodsky, David Kozak, Jason Stahlberg, William DeMichele, Michael Rose, Rich Iandoli, Adam Quenneville), 0 replies from prospects, 0 interest signals. 2 unread messages: counter-pitch from Vincent Handugan (VA services, Mar 20) and sponsored message from Keri Ribardiere (Mar 26) — neither is buying intent from a prospect.
